column1: They ... call the doctor because the grandmother was ill.
My parents were not at home and I ... look after my little sister.
It was Sunday yesterday, so he ... be at work.
I am sorry I couldn’t come yesterday. I ... work late.
We ... take any exams at the end of this term.

I ... get up at five every Sunday.
We ... walk all the way home because we can’t catch a taxi.
We ... be in a hurry. We still have plenty of time.
